script: RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv); RESP=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' -d "refresh_token=$RT" -d 'scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All offline_access'); TOKEN=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])'); echo "token-len=${#TOKEN}"; for ENTRY in '2c4a8184-13db-4d42-a65e-5def7414ce2c|Jesus R Claude' 'ee80c194-7458-488f-bd68-60c0611daf82|Cameron Claude' '2055981c-eb41-4060-9ea3-c4f5d6e24792|Ashley Claude'; do CAT=$(echo $ENTRY | cut -d'|' -f1); NAME=$(echo $ENTRY | cut -d'|' -f2); CODE=$(curl -sS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X DELETE "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CAT" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"); echo "  $NAME: HTTP=$CODE"; done
